evidence.snippet: Toray’s advanced carbon fiber composites are 40% lighter than aluminum, providing the lightest weight, highest strength material solution for eVTOL aircraft, UAVs, helicopters, launch structure, and commercial/general aviation aircraft.
Below we selected our star products for UAM from our broad portfolio of advanced composite materials.

items.notes: Core business: advanced composite materials (thermoset/thermoplastic prepregs, film adhesives, honeycomb core, surfacing films, syntactics) sold as raw inputs to eVTOL/UAV/aerospace structural manufacturers

evidence.snippet: In addition to intermediate materials, Toray’s CCS Group provides the industry with exceptionally durable and light weight carbon fiber compression molded parts.  CCS focuses on replacing aluminum and titanium with a lighter weight, more cost-effective solution to improve efficiency and performance.

items.notes: CCS Group subsidiary sells finished carbon fiber compression-molded structural parts (replacing aluminum/titanium)

products_categories.notes: All product lines are composite material inputs or finished structural parts; no airframe OEM, no avionics/electronics

headquarters.notes: Holding entity (Toray TCAC Holding B.V.) registered in Netherlands per footer; Morgan Hill, CA is listed first and is primary US/global operational HQ

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells composite raw materials (prepregs, films, adhesives, core materials) used by eVTOL/UAV manufacturers for structural fabrication; also sells compression-molded structural parts via CCS Group

products.notes: Many additional SKUs exist across thermoset, thermoplastic, tooling, adhesive, and radome product lines; only UAM-highlighted products enumerated here

ndaa.notes: No mention of NDAA Section 848 or 889 compliance anywhere in the fetched corpus. Documentation page lists AS9100D, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001, and Nadcap accreditations only.

blue_uas.notes: No mention of DIU Blue UAS or Blue sUAS cleared list anywhere in the fetched corpus.

evidence.snippet:
![Scalable Manufacturing](/media/1f5f596b-65a6-459c-831d-4468f3d9ecd7/s0gDAA/TAC/Images/Icons/Scalable-manufacturing_v1.1.png?w=16&h=9)
### Scalable Manufacturing
Automating material lay-up and eliminating lengthy processing steps from part production can be achieved with OOA and ATL capable thermosets and thermoplastics.
#### Toray Advanced Composites Morgan Hill AS9100D and ISO 9001:2015 certificate

readiness.notes: Leading global supplier to commercial, military, and space production programs; AS9100D and Nadcap certified at multiple manufacturing sites; catalog SKUs with established qualification databases

tagline: Manufactures thermoplastic and thermoset composite prepregs, UD tapes, honeycomb core, film adhesives, and tooling materials—including Cetex® and BT250E-6 product lines. Serves aerospace, space, and automotive markets with compression-molded parts and engineering support. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of defense/UAS application limited.
